temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) A man in a bright red suit and patterned shirt screams in anguish, his arms outstretched as he fires two pistols upwards. The scene then cuts to a different man, bald and wearing a dark jacket, who calmly aims a single pistol directly at the camera with a grim, determined expression. (Storyline: This opening sequence establishes a violent confrontation. The man in red appears to be a chaotic, emotional figure, while the man in the dark jacket is portrayed as a cold, focused, and menacing adversary.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Screaming in anguish. 2) Background sounds or music: Loud, echoing gunshots.)
(00:04-00:07) A man with long hair and a gold chain lies on a dark, gritty floor, his eyes wide with shock. A prominent, bloody wound is visible on his forehead. His shirt is stained with blood, and he lies motionless, gasping for air. (Storyline: This shot reveals the immediate, tragic aftermath of the gunshots, showing the victim's fatal or near-fatal state and confirming the lethality of the confrontation.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous hum and the sound of labored breathing.)
